# OutreachOS

> Personal lead management vault for cold outreach — import Excel prospects, organize privately, dial with call scripts.

## Site

- Home: https://outreachos.techxtreme.me/
- Pricing: https://outreachos.techxtreme.me/pricing
- Import guide: https://outreachos.techxtreme.me/import-guide
- Sign up: https://outreachos.techxtreme.me/auth/signup
- Login: https://outreachos.techxtreme.me/auth/login
- Demo: available from the home page (limited sample vault)

## Product

OutreachOS is a web app for individual operators who run outreach themselves.
Each account owns a private lead pool (not a shared team CRM by default).

Key capabilities:
- Excel / CSV import with flexible column aliases
- Filters by niche, country, and call status
- Sticky call-script notes while dialing
- Quest-style weekly dial challenges (optional)

## Pricing

- Free: up to 500 stored leads; 10 Excel imports per day; 200 rows per file
- Premium: unlimited stored leads; 30 import files per hour; up to 3000 rows per hour
  - ₹1499 INR / month
  - $15 USD / month
- How to buy: email techxtremebuisness@gmail.com from /pricing (Request Premium). The draft includes your OutreachOS username. Manual payment instructions by reply.

## Operator

Operated by Techxtreme. Support: techxtremebuisness@gmail.com
